quests.title: Harvest Dilemma
quests.objective: Resolve the dispute over grain allocation.

dialogue_nodes.speaker: Mayor Elara
dialogue_nodes.text: Winter stores are low. Should we support farmers or merchants first?

dialogue_nodes.speaker: Farmer Lia
dialogue_nodes.text: Thank you. The village trust grows with each harvest.

dialogue_nodes.speaker: Merchant Roan
dialogue_nodes.text: Trade routes are opening, but people may worry about rationing.
